title: Fix the birthday invitation
drDigitalIntro: Time for a real challenge! Below is a birthday invitation with a few mistakes in it. Edit it to fix the spelling, capitalization, and punctuation — using only the keyboard, no mouse needed. We'll practice everything you've learned in this unit.

playgroundTask.instructions: Fix the mistakes in this invitation: correct the spelling, capitalize names and the start of each sentence, and delete the duplicate word. Then click Check my work.
playgroundTask.startingText:
your invited to emma's birthday party

come on saturday july 25th at 2pm

the party party will be at the park on maple street

bring a swimsuit and a smile

hope to see you there
mustInclude: the party will be at the park on Maple Street

drDigitalSuccess: Wonderful editing! You fixed it all without touching the mouse.
drDigitalHint: "your" should be "You're" (you are). Capitalize names, days, months, and street names — Emma, Saturday, July, Maple Street. And look for one word that repeats twice in a row.
